message:
test(workflows): add workflow completion undo metadata test

Add comprehensive test for workflow completion audit trail:
- workflow_completion_updates_undo_metadata() validates that completed
  workflows properly record undo metadata in action history
- Tests workflow_start action has undoable=false with abort strategy
- Tests workflow_complete action has undoable=false with no-op strategy
- Validates proper undo_hint messages for each action type

This ensures the action history system correctly tracks workflow
lifecycle events for audit and potential rollback scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
